## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Run command '....'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## 📸 Screenshots/Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or error logs to help explain your problem.

```
[Paste error logs here with --debug enabled]
```

## 💻 Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- **Claude Desktop Version**: [e.g., 1.2.3]
- **MCP Server Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Authentication Method**: [OAuth, Service Account, Application Default]

## 📋 Configuration
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "google-sheets": {
      // Your configuration here (remove sensitive data)
    }
  }
}
```

## 🔍 Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to make sure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have included all relevant environment information
- [ ] I have enabled debug logging (`--debug`) and included the logs
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information (credentials, personal data)
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently
